title: chore(deps): bump @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.10

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): bump @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.10 in /scripts/gh-issue-triage
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Same dependency bump for a different workspace path, already merged

summary: Dependabot security update bumping @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.10 across 6 package.json files and the pnpm-lock.yaml. The upstream release fixes an authorization bypass in Serve Static Middleware caused by inconsistent URL decoding (%2F handling) between the router and static file resolution (GHSA-wc8c-qw6v-h7f6). The lockfile diff also includes unrelated transitive dependency churn (codemirror, ai SDK, braintrust, confbox). CI is currently failing: Build, Validate build outputs, and several test suites (Agent Builder, Core, MCP, Observability, RAG) are failing, with E2E, Full Test Suite, and Memory tests still pending.
maintainerNotes: This is a security fix and should be prioritized. The CI failures need investigation — the Build step itself is failing, which cascades to test failures. The build failure and lockfile churn (removal of zod@3.25.76 resolution paths, codemirror version bumps) suggest the lockfile may have drifted from main. A rebase via `@dependabot rebase` may resolve the CI issues. PR #13816 (same bump for scripts/gh-issue-triage) was already merged. No changeset is included, which is expected for a dependency-only bump with no API changes.
